title: Type Parameter Names Should Follow Established Naming Convention
description: This rule ensures that the names of type parameters comply with a given naming convention. This promotes efficient collaboration among the team as it distinguishes type parameters from poorly named classes.
recommendation: Ensure all type parameter names match the provided regular expression. Typically, single-letter type parameter names are preferred.
impact: Non-adherence to this rule may lead to confusion and inefficiency while reading and maintaining the code.

checks.message: Type parameter names should be single uppercase letters (e.g., T, E, K, V).
